lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What 'J' word describes the rescuers God sent to save His people?
Who was the first judge God sent to rescue His people?
Who was the left-handed judge God sent to rescue Israel?
What did Ehud make, and where did he hide it?
answers: A sword, hidden under his clothes on his right leg
A shield, hidden on his back
A spear, hidden in a bag
A dagger, hidden in his sandal

questions.text: What did Ehud do to Eglon?
answers: He stabbed him in the belly and escaped
He captured him and took him prisoner
He pushed him out of the window
He challenged him to a duel

questions.text: Why did the servants think King Eglon was taking so long?
answers: They thought he was using the bathroom
They thought he was eating a big meal
They thought he was taking a bath

questions.text: While the servants were waiting, what did Ehud do?
What happened after God sent a judge to rescue His people?
answers: They enjoyed a time of peace
They decided to never worship other gods again
